metadata.title: Akamai Guardicore Incident-Enrichment — one-click bootstrap
metadata.description: Deploys the entire Akamai Guardicore incident-enrichment stack in one shot: Storage Account + GuardicoreConnectionSlots Azure Table, Data Collection Endpoint (or reuses an existing one), Data Collection Rule, two custom log tables, two Logic Apps (trigger playbook + recurrence runner), and the role assignments the Logic Apps' managed identities need to write to the DCR and the storage account. After deployment, the only manual step is wiring the trigger playbook to a Sentinel automation rule.
Name of the Microsoft Sentinel-enabled Log Analytics workspace that will receive enrichment data.
Resource group of the Sentinel workspace. Defaults to the deployment resource group.
Guardicore Centra management base URL, https only, no trailing slash. Example: https://yourcompany.cloud.guardicore.com
Guardicore service-account username (Read-only role is sufficient).
Name of the trigger Logic App. Default matches the legacy v1 playbook name so existing automation rules continue to match.
Name of the recurrence-triggered runner Logic App.
Optional. Globally unique 3-24 character lowercase alphanumeric storage account name. If left blank, a unique name is auto-generated.
Optional. Resource ID of an existing Data Collection Endpoint in the same region as the workspace. If left blank, a new DCE is created in this resource group.

resources.comments: 1 — Storage Account hosting the work-queue Azure Table.
resources.name: [variables('actualStorageAccountName')]

resources.comments: 2 — Default tableServices on the storage account.
resources.name: [concat(variables('actualStorageAccountName'), '/default')]

resources.comments: 4 — Optional DCE; created only if no existing DCE was supplied.
resources.name: [variables('newDceName')]

resources.comments: 5 — Data Collection Rule routing the two enrichment streams to the workspace.
resources.name: [variables('dcrName')]

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = now(), sampling_timestamp = toint(datetime_diff("second", now(), datetime(1970-01-01)))

resources.comments: 7 — azuresentinel managed-API connection (used by trigger Logic App).
resources.name: [variables('azureSentinelConnectionName')]

resources.comments: 8 — azuretables managed-API connection (shared between trigger and runner).
resources.name: [variables('azureTablesConnectionName')]

resources.comments: 9 — Trigger Logic App: Sentinel-incident-creation triggered, fans out to 3 slots, writes manifest to GuardicoreProcessedIncidents_CL.
resources.name: [parameters('PlaybookName')]

inputs.note: Insert failed (likely 409 Conflict); the existing PENDING/IN_PROGRESS/COMPLETED row is left untouched per dedup contract.

resources.comments: 10 — Runner Logic App: every 2 minutes, claim a due slot, fetch Guardicore connections, ingest to GuardicoreEnrichingConnections_CL.
resources.name: [parameters('RunnerName')]

queries.$filter: @{concat('((status eq ''pending'' or status eq ''retry'') and slot_start le datetime''', outputs('Compute_eligibility_cutoff')['eligible_before'], ''') or (status eq ''in_progress'' and last_updated lt datetime''', outputs('Compute_eligibility_cutoff')['stale_before'], ''')')}

resources.comments: 11 — Role: trigger Logic App MI -> Monitoring Metrics Publisher on the DCR.
resources.name: [guid(variables('dcrResourceId'), parameters('PlaybookName'), 'mmp')]

resources.comments: 12 — Role: runner Logic App MI -> Monitoring Metrics Publisher on the DCR.
resources.name: [guid(variables('dcrResourceId'), parameters('RunnerName'), 'mmp')]

resources.comments: 13 — Role: trigger Logic App MI -> Storage Account Contributor (so MI can listKeys / read tables).
resources.name: [guid(variables('storageAccountId'), parameters('PlaybookName'), 'sac')]

resources.comments: 14 — Role: runner Logic App MI -> Storage Account Contributor.
resources.name: [guid(variables('storageAccountId'), parameters('RunnerName'), 'sac')]

resources.comments: 13 — Role: trigger Logic App MI -> Storage Account Contributor (so MI can listKeys / read tables).
resources.name: [guid(variables('storageAccountId'), parameters('PlaybookName'), 'stdc')]

resources.comments: 14 — Role: runner Logic App MI -> Storage Account Contributor.
resources.name: [guid(variables('storageAccountId'), parameters('RunnerName'), 'stdc')]

manualPostDeploySteps.value: After deployment: (1) Open the azuresentinel-<PlaybookName> connection in the portal and click Authorize to consent to the managed-identity-backed Sentinel connection. (2) Create a Sentinel Automation Rule that fires <PlaybookName> on incident creation. (3) If the workspace is in a different resource group than this deployment, manually grant the trigger Logic App's MI the 'Microsoft Sentinel Responder' role on the workspace.
